phases.description: reviewing your CRM export, contact list, or outreach dataset to understand structure, issues, and business purpose.
phases.title: Data Intake

phases.description: format checks, syntax validation, duplicate flagging, and missing field identification.
phases.title: Automated Layer

phases.description: manual review of contact status, job title, company association, and role relevance for critical records.
phases.title: Human Verification Layer

phases.description: clean records, invalid records, duplicates, missing fields, and recommended next actions.
phases.title: Validation Report

phases.description: structured, CRM-ready file in your required format.
phases.title: Clean Data Delivery
